ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100051915) FILED BY DEFENDANT MILLER, MATTHEW S.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF PULATOV, ERKINDJON AKA ERIK PULATOV AN INDIVIDUAL

DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MATTHEW MILLER'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT DISCOVERY REQUESTS; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF ERKINDJON PULATOV SHALL SERVE VERIFIED CODE-COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE), SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), AND REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DAMAGES, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS EXCEPT PRIVILEGE, AND A PRIVILEGE LOG FOR ANY DOCUMENTS WITHHELD PURSUANT TO AN OBJECTION, WITHIN 20 DAYS. PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL SAMUELSON, WILSON & ROE SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $320, WITHIN 20 DAYS. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING BY EMAIL TO JUDGE PRO TEM ARON MINNIS AT AARON@MINNISANDSMALLETS.COM JUDGE PRO TEM: AARON MINNIS; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100073432)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Responses To Defendant Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MATTHEW MILLER's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Responses To Defendant Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Off Calendar. Notice of dismissal of complaint filed on June 3, 2019.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Defendant Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MATTHEW MILLER'S Motion To Compel Responses To Defendant Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions

Granted, no opposition filed. Plaintiff Erkindjon Pulatov shall serve verified Code-compliant responses to Form Interrogatories (Set One), Request for Production of Documents (Set One), Special Interrogatories (Set One), and Request for Statement of Damages, without objections except privilege, and a privilege log for any documents withheld pursuant to an objection, within 20 days. Plaintiff shall pay Defendant's counsel Samuelson, Wilson & Roe sanctions in the amount of $320, within 20 days.

The prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling by email to Judge Pro Tem Aron Minnis at aaron@minnisandsmallets.com

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
